signUp.title: Sign up
signUp.intro: Alkemio is designed to benefit society. Please read and accept the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> before you continue.
signUp.acceptTerms: I accept the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
signUp.openTerms: Open Terms of Use in a new tab
signUp.openPrivacy: Open Privacy Policy in a new tab

recovery.title: Password recovery
recovery.intro: Please enter your email address below to receive a recovery link that will allow you to reset your password.
recovery.resendNotice:
Haven't received the email?
Check your spam folder, confirm the address below is correct, then request a new recovery email once the timer ends.

verification.title: Verify your email
verification.intro: Please check your inbox for an email with instructions to verify your address.

verificationReminder.title: Verify your email
verificationReminder.body: The last step is to verify your email address. Please check your inbox for an email with instructions.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.generic: An unexpected error occurred during authentication. Please try signing in again.

fields.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
